name: com.maddr.match-core
description: Engine-agnostic deterministic match simulation for the RTS layer (docs/23): fixed-tick MatchState, PlayerState, faction defs, entity-ID allocation, and canonical bitwise-hashed serialization -- the pure (seed, command-stream) function docs/23 §11 lockstep 4v4 is built on. Pure C#, zero UnityEngine reference; built and tested standalone via dotnet (Tests~, hidden from Unity by the ~ suffix). References com.maddr.citygen-core.
